query: I've got the audit synthesis with 9 critical findings across money, authz, RLS and the frontend — I want to hit all four at once, not one after another. How should I set this up?
spin up an agent for each of the 12 restaurant prospects and build their demo storefronts in parallel
these five migrations are totally independent, can we fan out and do them all at the same time
max lanes on this please — I need the courier routes, the owner GDPR endpoints, and the admin CRM page all refactored today

last time I ran two agents on the checkout code they clobbered each other's edits to orders.ts. I want to run several agents again but not have that happen — how do I split the work so they don't collide?
we have 8 unrelated failing test files in different subsystems, dispatch one investigator per file concurrently
run these in parallel: update the i18n keys, fix the modifier-groups route, and rewrite the settings page — but keep them from stepping on each other
I'm about to emit a bunch of Agent tool-uses in one turn to remediate the six-lane audit. before I do, help me partition it so no two lanes own the same file
parallel remediation across the whole authz surface — 15 IDOR sites in different owner routes, want them all going at once
do all of these at once and give each its own worktree so the git index doesn't get shared between them
the money lane and the FE lane both need to edit i18n-catalog.ts — should I just let whichever finishes first win?
refactor server.ts to split the route registration out of the god-file
run the playwright reliability gate against staging and give me a GO/NO-GO
is there a skill that can help me discover other skills for deployment tasks?
certify the sandbox-swarm-gate loop — run it through the M1-M11 rubric
two of my background agents finished and now I need to review their diffs and decide whether to merge — what's the gate checklist?
this change depends on the migration landing first, then the API, then the frontend — walk me through the order
write a contextual commit for the money LC1 fix I just finished
just fix the typo in the checkout heading, it's a one-liner
how do I make a new skill for the audit-remediation workflow and test that it triggers correctly?
